pausedBanner: Sync paused — your copies stay on this device
emptyHint: Copy on a device → it appears here.
soundDesc: Play a small "pop" sound when a clip arrives
launchAtLoginDesc: Start Mimoe when you log in
securityDesc1: Copies marked as sensitive (passwords) are ignored automatically — never encrypted or sent.
securityDesc2: History: 24h or last 100 clips. The server only sees encrypted content.
unpairConfirm: Unpair? You will have to sign in again.
blacklistDesc: Copies made from these apps are never synced.
onboardingSub0: Copy on your phone, paste on your computer. End-to-end encrypted, on your own server.
onboardingSub1: The URL of your Mimoe instance. It is the only meeting point — it never sees your clear data.
onboardingSub2: Your account connects all your devices. Isolated history, only yours.
onboardingSub3: A passphrase you type on each of your devices. It encrypts everything and never leaves this device.
seedRevealSub: They derive your encryption key. Without them, no other device can read your clipboard.
seedRevealWarning: Paper or a password manager. Avoid screenshots: they end up in iCloud or Google Photos, and your key with them.
seedQuizSub: Type the requested words to confirm you saved them.
seedInputSub: Enter the 12 words shown when you created your account. They derive your encryption key.
registrationClosedSub: Registrations are closed on this server. Sign in with an existing account.
registrationClosedNotice: This server is not accepting new registrations. You need an account created by its administrator.
deleteAccountConfirm: Permanently delete your account and all its data, on ALL your devices? This cannot be undone.
deleteAccountError: Account deletion failed. Please try again.
